brand.name: BookedOnCall
brand.tagline: AI phone assistant for trades businesses
brand.description: BookedOnCall is an AI phone assistant for home-service businesses that answers inbound calls, captures job details, and moves qualified callers toward confirmed appointments, owner-approved booking requests, or clear callbacks based on the shop's setup.

positioning.oneLiner: BookedOnCall is an AI phone assistant for home-service businesses that answers inbound calls, captures job details, and moves qualified callers toward confirmed appointments, owner-approved booking requests, or clear callbacks based on the shop's setup.

validatedCapabilities: Answers inbound calls for plumbing, HVAC, electrical, painting, flooring, landscaping, roofing, and general home-service businesses.
Collects caller name, callback number, address, job details, and service notes.
Can offer appointment paths when scheduling is turned on, the shop's rules have been reviewed, and the request fits those rules.
Can use Jobber, Google Calendar, email summaries, and customer text messaging after those tools are set up during onboarding.
Delivers a clear call summary and the next step, whether that is a confirmed appointment, an owner-approved booking request, or a callback request.
Can send follow-up texts when customer messaging is turned on.

sourcedProof.title: 54% said they would not leave a voicemail
sourcedProof.detail: In Moneypenny's 2023 Censuswide survey of UK and US consumers, over half said they would not leave a voicemail when calling a business.

sourcedProof.title: 46% of home-services phone leads converted on the call
sourcedProof.detail: Invoca's 2025 home-services benchmark reports that 37% of digital-marketing calls were leads and 46% of those leads converted during the call.
sourcedProof.sourceLabel: Invoca Home Services Call Conversion Benchmarks

sourcedProof.title: $17.90/hour median receptionist wage
sourcedProof.detail: The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics reported a median hourly wage of $17.90 for receptionists in May 2024.

integrations.name: Jobber
integrations.description: Connect Jobber during setup so BookedOnCall can fit the scheduling process you already use.

integrations.name: Google Calendar
integrations.description: Connect Google Calendar so BookedOnCall can check availability before offering supported appointment paths.

integrations.name: Email summaries
integrations.description: Send call summaries and next steps to the inbox you already check after each handled call.

integrations.name: Text / SMS
integrations.description: Use customer text messaging for supported follow-up, confirmations, and callback communication.

integrations.name: QuickBooks
integrations.description: Planned: QuickBooks is a targeted future integration for customer context and office follow-up, but it is not live in BookedOnCall today.

integrations.name: Housecall Pro
integrations.description: Planned: Housecall Pro is a possible future integration for shops that want BookedOnCall to fit how their office already works.

integrations.name: ServiceTitan
integrations.description: Planned: ServiceTitan is a possible future integration for larger shops that want BookedOnCall to fit their CSR and dispatch process.

plans.name: Starter
plans.summary: For owner-operators and small shops that want missed calls answered, caller details captured, and booking requests or callbacks routed cleanly without adding a front desk.
features: Trades-focused call answering and lead intake
Caller name, callback number, address, service need, urgency, and preferred window captured
Clear callbacks and owner-approved booking requests when you want to review first
Booking paths when your reviewed setup and connected schedule allow it
Jobber, Google Calendar, email, or text follow-up when enabled for your business
Call summaries with the next step clearly laid out

plans.name: Pro
plans.summary: For busier shops that want more included minutes, a more branded caller experience, and tighter rules for urgent calls, owner review, and appointment handling.
features: More room for after-hours, overflow, and higher call-volume coverage
More control over urgent-call flags, owner-review rules, and appointment handling
Give the assistant a custom name
Customize the greeting and call style so it sounds more like your shop
More detailed call summaries for jobs that need owner review
